texto: You don't have to drink this," I said, handing him the champagne. "But Sandy might like it"."No,no. Come on, let's have some," he grinned, popping the cork, taking a swig from the bottle and passing it back. He [HST] rarely failed to show his appreciation of someone appreciating him, which is an admirable trait.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jay Cowan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “You don't have to drink this," I said, handing him the champagne. "But Sandy might like it"."No,n…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, appreciation, biography pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de biography e character.

frase_original: You don't have to drink this," I said, handing him the champagne. "But Sandy might like it"."No,no. Come on, let's have some," he grinned, popping the cork, taking a swig from the bottle and passing it back. He [HST] rarely failed to show his appreciation of someone appreciating him, which is an admirable trait.
